scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && pnpm --filter @tinker/product-analysis build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && pnpm --filter @tinker/product-analysis build && tsx src/compileProject.test.ts && tsx src/aiPlanning.test.ts && tsx src/runAiUrlDemo.test.ts && tsx src/localGenerationJob.test.ts && tsx src/fixtureSamples.test.ts
scripts.generate:manual-demo: pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && tsx scripts/generateManualDemo.ts
scripts.generate:local-job: pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && tsx scripts/generateLocalJob.ts
scripts.generate:ai-url-fixture-job: pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && pnpm --filter @tinker/product-analysis build && tsx scripts/generateAiUrlFixtureJob.ts
